list.name: instance
list.label: Instance
list.description: Monitored SQL Server instance - one MSSQL datasource per instance. Type to search.

targets.rawSql:
SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), sh.collection_time), bad_pages_detected = CONVERT(float, sh.BadPagesDetected), bad_pages_fixed = CONVERT(float, sh.BadPagesFixed), interval_dump_requests = CONVERT(float, sh.intervalDumpRequests) FROM collect.HealthParser_SystemHealth AS sh WHERE sh.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND sh.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) ORDER BY sh.collection_time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), sh.collection_time), access_violation_occurred = CONVERT(float, sh.isAccessViolationOccurred), write_access_violations = CONVERT(float, sh.writeAccessViolationCount) FROM collect.HealthParser_SystemHealth AS sh WHERE sh.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND sh.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) ORDER BY sh.collection_time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (200)
    sh.id,
    collection_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), sh.collection_time),
    event_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), sh.event_time),
    sh.state,
    bad_pages_detected = sh.BadPagesDetected,
    bad_pages_fixed = sh.BadPagesFixed,
    is_access_violation_occurred = sh.isAccessViolationOccurred,
    write_access_violation_count = sh.writeAccessViolationCount,
    total_dump_requests = sh.totalDumpRequests,
    interval_dump_requests = sh.intervalDumpRequests,
    spinlock_backoffs = sh.spinlockBackoffs,
    sick_spinlock_type = sh.sickSpinlockType,
    sick_spinlock_type_after_av = sh.sickSpinlockTypeAfterAv,
    latch_warnings = sh.latchWarnings,
    non_yielding_tasks_reported = sh.nonYieldingTasksReported,
    page_faults = sh.pageFaults,
    system_cpu_utilization = sh.systemCpuUtilization,
    sql_cpu_utilization = sh.sqlCpuUtilization
FROM collect.HealthParser_SystemHealth AS sh
WHERE sh.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND sh.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
ORDER BY sh.collection_time DESC;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), sh.collection_time), non_yielding_tasks = CONVERT(float, sh.nonYieldingTasksReported), latch_warnings = CONVERT(float, sh.latchWarnings), spinlock_backoffs = CONVERT(float, sh.spinlockBackoffs) FROM collect.HealthParser_SystemHealth AS sh WHERE sh.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND sh.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) ORDER BY sh.collection_time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), sh.collection_time), sql_cpu = sh.sqlCpuUtilization, system_cpu = sh.systemCpuUtilization FROM collect.HealthParser_SystemHealth AS sh WHERE sh.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND sh.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) ORDER BY sh.collection_time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT
    time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), sh.collection_time),
    metric = sh.sickSpinlockType,
    value = CONVERT(float, ISNULL(sh.spinlockBackoffs, 1))
FROM collect.HealthParser_SystemHealth AS sh
WHERE sh.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND sh.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    AND sh.sickSpinlockType IS NOT NULL
    AND sh.sickSpinlockType IN (
        SELECT TOP (5)
            s2.sickSpinlockType
        FROM collect.HealthParser_SystemHealth AS s2
        WHERE s2.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND s2.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
            AND s2.sickSpinlockType IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY s2.sickSpinlockType
        ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    )
ORDER BY sh.collection_time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT time = DATEADD(HOUR, DATEDIFF(HOUR, 0, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), se.collection_time)), 0), errors = COUNT_BIG(*) FROM collect.HealthParser_SevereErrors AS se WHERE se.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND se.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) GROUP BY DATEADD(HOUR, DATEDIFF(HOUR, 0, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), se.collection_time)), 0) ORDER BY 1;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (200)
    se.id,
    collection_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), se.collection_time),
    event_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), se.event_time),
    se.error_number,
    se.severity,
    se.state,
    se.database_name,
    se.database_id,
    se.message
FROM collect.HealthParser_SevereErrors AS se
WHERE se.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND se.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
ORDER BY se.collection_time DESC;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), io.collection_time), io_latch_timeouts = io.ioLatchTimeouts, interval_long_ios = io.intervalLongIos FROM collect.HealthParser_IOIssues AS io WHERE io.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND io.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) ORDER BY io.collection_time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (100)
    collection_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), io.collection_time),
    event_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), io.event_time),
    io.state,
    io_latch_timeouts = io.ioLatchTimeouts,
    interval_long_ios = io.intervalLongIos,
    total_long_ios = io.totalLongIos,
    longest_pending_request_duration_ms = io.longestPendingRequests_duration_ms,
    longest_pending_request_file_path = io.longestPendingRequests_filePath
FROM collect.HealthParser_IOIssues AS io
WHERE io.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND io.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
ORDER BY io.collection_time DESC;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT v = COUNT_BIG(*) FROM collect.HealthParser_SchedulerIssues AS si WHERE si.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND si.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()));

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT v = ISNULL(SUM(TRY_CAST(si.non_yielding_time_ms AS bigint)), 0) FROM collect.HealthParser_SchedulerIssues AS si WHERE si.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND si.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()));

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT v = ISNULL(MAX(TRY_CAST(si.non_yielding_time_ms AS bigint)), 0) FROM collect.HealthParser_SchedulerIssues AS si WHERE si.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND si.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()));

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT v = COUNT_BIG(DISTINCT si.scheduler_id) FROM collect.HealthParser_SchedulerIssues AS si WHERE si.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND si.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()));

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT v = COUNT_BIG(*) FROM collect.HealthParser_SchedulerIssues AS si WHERE si.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND si.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) AND si.is_online = 0;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), si.collection_time), scheduler_id = si.scheduler_id, non_yielding_ms = CONVERT(float, si.non_yielding_time_ms) FROM collect.HealthParser_SchedulerIssues AS si WHERE si.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND si.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) ORDER BY si.collection_time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (100)
    si.id,
    collection_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), si.collection_time),
    event_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), si.event_time),
    si.scheduler_id,
    si.cpu_id,
    si.status,
    si.is_online,
    si.is_runnable,
    si.is_running,
    si.non_yielding_time_ms,
    si.thread_quantum_ms
FROM collect.HealthParser_SchedulerIssues AS si
WHERE si.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND si.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
ORDER BY si.collection_time DESC;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT time = DATEADD(HOUR, DATEDIFF(HOUR, 0, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), mc.event_time)), 0), oom_exceptions = SUM(mc.outOfMemoryExceptions) FROM collect.HealthParser_MemoryConditions AS mc WHERE mc.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND mc.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) GROUP BY DATEADD(HOUR, DATEDIFF(HOUR, 0, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), mc.event_time)), 0) ORDER BY 1;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (100)
    mc.id,
    collection_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), mc.collection_time),
    event_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), mc.event_time),
    last_notification = mc.lastNotification,
    out_of_memory_exceptions = mc.outOfMemoryExceptions,
    is_any_pool_out_of_memory = mc.isAnyPoolOutOfMemory,
    process_out_of_memory_period = mc.processOutOfMemoryPeriod,
    mc.name,
    mc.available_physical_memory_gb,
    mc.available_virtual_memory_gb,
    mc.available_paging_file_gb,
    mc.working_set_gb,
    mc.percent_of_committed_memory_in_ws,
    mc.page_faults,
    mc.system_physical_memory_high,
    mc.system_physical_memory_low,
    mc.process_physical_memory_low,
    mc.process_virtual_memory_low,
    mc.vm_reserved_gb,
    mc.vm_committed_gb,
    mc.target_committed_gb,
    mc.current_committed_gb
FROM collect.HealthParser_MemoryConditions AS mc
WHERE mc.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND mc.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
ORDER BY mc.collection_time DESC;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT v = COUNT_BIG(*) FROM collect.HealthParser_CPUTasks AS ct WHERE ct.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ct.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) AND ct.hasUnresolvableDeadlockOccurred = 1;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT v = COUNT_BIG(*) FROM collect.HealthParser_CPUTasks AS ct WHERE ct.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ct.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) AND ct.hasDeadlockedSchedulersOccurred = 1;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT v = COUNT_BIG(*) FROM collect.HealthParser_CPUTasks AS ct WHERE ct.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ct.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) AND ct.didBlockingOccur = 1;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT v = COUNT_BIG(*) FROM collect.HealthParser_CPUTasks AS ct WHERE ct.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ct.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) AND ISNULL(ct.pendingTasks, 0) > 0 AND ISNULL(ct.didBlockingOccur, 0) = 0;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), ct.collection_time), workers_created = ct.workersCreated, workers_idle = ct.workersIdle, max_workers = ct.maxWorkers FROM collect.HealthParser_CPUTasks AS ct WHERE ct.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ct.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) ORDER BY ct.collection_time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), ct.collection_time), pending_tasks = ct.pendingTasks, oldest_pending_wait_ms = ct.oldestPendingTaskWaitingTime FROM collect.HealthParser_CPUTasks AS ct WHERE ct.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ct.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) ORDER BY ct.collection_time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (200)
    ct.id,
    collection_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), ct.collection_time),
    event_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), ct.event_time),
    ct.state,
    max_workers = ct.maxWorkers,
    workers_created = ct.workersCreated,
    workers_idle = ct.workersIdle,
    tasks_completed_within_interval = ct.tasksCompletedWithinInterval,
    pending_tasks = ct.pendingTasks,
    oldest_pending_task_waiting_time = ct.oldestPendingTaskWaitingTime,
    has_unresolvable_deadlock_occurred = ct.hasUnresolvableDeadlockOccurred,
    has_deadlocked_schedulers_occurred = ct.hasDeadlockedSchedulersOccurred,
    did_blocking_occur = ct.didBlockingOccur
FROM collect.HealthParser_CPUTasks AS ct
WHERE ct.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND ct.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
ORDER BY ct.collection_time DESC;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), mb.collection_time), metric = mb.broker, value = CONVERT(float, mb.currently_allocated) FROM collect.HealthParser_MemoryBroker AS mb WHERE mb.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND mb.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) ORDER BY mb.collection_time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), mb.collection_time), memory_ratio = CONVERT(float, mb.memory_ratio), overall = CONVERT(float, mb.overall) FROM collect.HealthParser_MemoryBroker AS mb WHERE mb.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND mb.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) ORDER BY mb.collection_time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (200)
    mb.id,
    collection_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), mb.collection_time),
    event_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), mb.event_time),
    mb.broker_id,
    mb.pool_metadata_id,
    mb.delta_time,
    mb.broker,
    mb.notification,
    mb.memory_ratio,
    mb.new_target,
    mb.overall,
    mb.rate,
    mb.currently_predicated,
    mb.currently_allocated,
    mb.previously_allocated
FROM collect.HealthParser_MemoryBroker AS mb
WHERE mb.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND mb.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
ORDER BY mb.collection_time DESC;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), hpmn.event_time), value = CONVERT(float, hpmn.memory_utilization_pct) FROM collect.HealthParser_MemoryNodeOOM AS hpmn WHERE hpmn.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND hpmn.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) AND hpmn.memory_utilization_pct IS NOT NULL ORDER BY hpmn.event_time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT
    time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), hpmn.event_time),
    target = CONVERT(float, hpmn.target_kb) / 1048576.0,
    committed = CONVERT(float, hpmn.committed_kb) / 1048576.0,
    total_page_file = CONVERT(float, hpmn.total_page_file_kb) / 1048576.0,
    available_page_file = CONVERT(float, hpmn.available_page_file_kb) / 1048576.0
FROM collect.HealthParser_MemoryNodeOOM AS hpmn
WHERE hpmn.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND hpmn.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
ORDER BY hpmn.event_time;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT time = DATEADD(HOUR, DATEDIFF(HOUR, 0, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), hpmn.event_time)), 0), oom_events = COUNT_BIG(*) FROM collect.HealthParser_MemoryNodeOOM AS hpmn WHERE hpmn.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND hpmn.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) GROUP BY DATEADD(HOUR, DATEDIFF(HOUR, 0, DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), hpmn.event_time)), 0) ORDER BY 1;

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT v = COUNT_BIG(*) FROM collect.HealthParser_MemoryNodeOOM AS hpmn WHERE hpmn.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND hpmn.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) AND LOWER(hpmn.is_system_physical_memory_high) = 'true';

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT v = COUNT_BIG(*) FROM collect.HealthParser_MemoryNodeOOM AS hpmn WHERE hpmn.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND hpmn.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) AND LOWER(hpmn.is_system_physical_memory_low) = 'true';

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT v = COUNT_BIG(*) FROM collect.HealthParser_MemoryNodeOOM AS hpmn WHERE hpmn.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND hpmn.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) AND LOWER(hpmn.is_process_physical_memory_low) = 'true';

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT v = COUNT_BIG(*) FROM collect.HealthParser_MemoryNodeOOM AS hpmn WHERE hpmn.event_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND hpmn.event_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo())) AND LOWER(hpmn.is_process_virtual_memory_low) = 'true';

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (100)
    hpmn.id,
    collection_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), hpmn.collection_time),
    event_time = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), hpmn.event_time),
    hpmn.node_id,
    hpmn.memory_node_id,
    hpmn.memory_utilization_pct,
    total_physical_memory_gb = CONVERT(decimal(18,2), hpmn.total_physical_memory_kb / 1048576.0),
    available_physical_memory_gb = CONVERT(decimal(18,2), hpmn.available_physical_memory_kb / 1048576.0),
    total_page_file_gb = CONVERT(decimal(18,2), hpmn.total_page_file_kb / 1048576.0),
    available_page_file_gb = CONVERT(decimal(18,2), hpmn.available_page_file_kb / 1048576.0),
    total_virtual_address_space_gb = CONVERT(decimal(18,2), hpmn.total_virtual_address_space_kb / 1048576.0),
    available_virtual_address_space_gb = CONVERT(decimal(18,2), hpmn.available_virtual_address_space_kb / 1048576.0),
    target_gb = CONVERT(decimal(18,2), hpmn.target_kb / 1048576.0),
    reserved_gb = CONVERT(decimal(18,2), hpmn.reserved_kb / 1048576.0),
    committed_gb = CONVERT(decimal(18,2), hpmn.committed_kb / 1048576.0),
    shared_committed_gb = CONVERT(decimal(18,2), hpmn.shared_committed_kb / 1048576.0),
    awe_gb = CONVERT(decimal(18,2), hpmn.awe_kb / 1048576.0),
    pages_gb = CONVERT(decimal(18,2), hpmn.pages_kb / 1048576.0),
    hpmn.failure_type,
    hpmn.failure_value,
    hpmn.resources,
    hpmn.factor_text,
    hpmn.factor_value,
    hpmn.last_error,
    hpmn.pool_metadata_id,
    hpmn.is_process_in_job,
    hpmn.is_system_physical_memory_high,
    hpmn.is_system_physical_memory_low,
    hpmn.is_process_physical_memory_low,
    hpmn.is_process_virtual_memory_low
FROM collect.HealthParser_MemoryNodeOOM AS hpmn
WHERE hpmn.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND hpmn.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
ORDER BY hpmn.collection_time DESC;
